recalls.Description: H-E-B is recalling its Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick bracelets sold in a 12-pack due to a potential skin irritation hazard. The affected bracelets, available in vibrant colors like green, red, pink, orange, yellow, and blue, feature the name "Destination Holiday Bracelets" on the packaging. The green glow stick bracelet may leak, posing a risk to users.
recalls.Title: H-E-B Issues Recall for Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick Bracelets Due to Skin Irritation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach H-E-B at 855-432-4438, available from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at www.heb.com by selecting "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page or visiting https://newsroom.heb.com/heb-news/recalls/.

Products.Name: Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick Bracelets

Images.Caption: Recalled 12-pack Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick Bracelets

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of a green bracelet leaking. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at H-E-B stores across Texas from September 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $1

Importers.Name: H-E-B, LP, of San Antonio, Texas

Hazards.Name: Skin irritation risk from leaking green glow stick bracelet

Remedies.Name: Return the green bracelet or the entire 12-pack for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: H-E-B recalls Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick Bracelets due to a skin irritation hazard. Learn how to return for a refund.

recalls.Description:
MTC Trading is recalling Party Favors lite-up torches and mini laser pointers due to serious safety risks associated with button cell batteries. The affected products include various models of lite-up torches and mini laser pointers, all of which come with pre-installed batteries that can be easily accessed by children. This poses a significant risk of ingestion, leading to severe injuries or even fatal outcomes. The model numbers are printed on the hang tags for identification.

Consumers are urged to stop using these items immediately and keep them out of children's reach. MTC Trading is offering full refunds for the recalled products, contingent on the disposal verification of the items. It is crucial to follow local hazardous waste disposal guidelines for the button cell batteries to ensure safety.
recalls.Title: Recall of Party Favors Lite-Up Torches and Mini Laser Pointers Due to Battery Ingestion Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, contact MTC Trading at 650-866-4800 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, email mtcmans@gmail.com, or visit www.mtcmans.com/recall for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled MTC Trading Co. Large Lite-Up Torches
Recalled MTC Trading Co. Lite-Up Torches
Recalled MTC Trading Co. Mini Lite-Up Torches
Recalled MTC Trading Co. Mini Laser Pointers

Retailers.Name: All Star Toys in Brooklyn, NY

Importers.Name: MTC Trading Company, of San Francisco, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death due to easily accessible button cell batteries in violation of safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the products, keep them away from children, and request a full refund from MTC Trading.

recalls.metaDescription: MTC Trading recalls Party Favors lite-up torches and laser pointers due to battery ingestion risks. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: The recall affects LED gloves, model ST01, which come in small and medium sizes and feature various flashing modes. These gloves are equipped with two pre-installed lithium coin batteries and include four additional batteries. The packaging is marked with "LED Gloves" on the upper left side and "Model ST01" on the bottom of the box.
recalls.Title: LED Gloves Recalled Due to Battery Ingestion Hazard; Violates Toy Safety Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Minongad via email at yummyet2022@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled LED Gloves, Model ST01 – Packaging
Recalled LED Gloves, Model ST01 – Bottom of Package

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from Minongad between January 2025 and April 2025 for approximately $14.

Hazards.Name: The LED gloves do not comply with safety standards for toys with coin batteries, as the battery compartment can be easily accessed by children. The spare batteries are not in child-resistant packaging and lack necessary warnings. Ingesting button cell or coin batteries can lead to severe injuries, chemical burns, or even fatal outcomes.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled LED gloves immediately, keep them away from children, and dispose of them properly. Contact Minongad for a full refund. Note: Button cell and coin batteries pose hazards and should be disposed of or recycled according to local hazardous waste guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: LED gloves pose serious battery ingestion risks. Stop use immediately and contact Minongad for a refund.

recalls.Description: SNLN Party Supply Toys, which include various items like bunny ears, cat ears, party glasses, glow bracelets, mini flashlights, light-up rings, butterfly clips, and a sticker book, are being recalled due to safety concerns. These toys, available in multiple colors including red, blue, green, yellow, white, and pink, have been found to pose a significant ingestion hazard for children. The battery compartment can be easily accessed, violating federal toy safety standards.
recalls.Title: SNLN Party Supply Toys Recalled for Ingestion Risk; Serious Injury or Death Possible
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Yiwu Dixikeji Douxiangongsi via email at dixikeji@gmail.com for assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled SNLN Party Supply Toys with Butterfly Clips, Mini Flashlights, Light-Up Ring, Sticker Book and 100-Piece Glow Bracelets
Recalled SNLN Party Supply Toys with Light-Up Party Glasses
Recalled SNLN Party Supply Toys with Bunny and Cat Light-Up Ears
Recalled SNLN Party Supply Toys (battery compartments)

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon from January 2025 to May 2025 for approximately $22.

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to accessible battery compartment

Remedies.Name: Stop using the toys immediately and keep them away from children. Contact Yiwu Dixikeji Douxiangongsi for a full refund by sending a photo of the disposed toys to dixikeji@gmail.com. Follow local hazardous waste procedures for battery disposal.

recalls.metaDescription: SNLN Party Supply Toys recalled due to ingestion hazards; risk of serious injury or death. Contact for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: Leetous has issued a recall for its LED glow stick and glasses party pack due to a significant risk of injury or death from battery ingestion. This party pack includes six light-up glasses in blue, pink, and white, along with six glow sticks in orange, green, blue, red, and purple. The products are packaged in a blue box featuring party graphics, with the Leetous logo on the upper left corner and 'Model No. LTXN1003' printed on the back.
recalls.Title: Leetous Recalls LED Glow Stick and Glasses Party Pack Due to Serious Ingestion Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Leetous via email at amazonus@leetous.com.

Products.Name: LED Glow Stick and Glasses Party Pack

Images.Caption: Glow sticks included in the recalled party pack toys
Glasses included in the recalled party packs
Recalled glow sticks and glasses party pack toys – box
"Model No. LTXN1003" is printed on the back of the product packaging

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from October 2024 to February 2025 for approximately $15

Distributors.Name: Liangyu Technology Co., Ltd., dba Leetous, of China

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to easily accessible button cell batteries

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product, remove batteries, and contact Leetous for disposal instructions and a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Leetous recalls LED glow stick and glasses party pack due to serious ingestion hazards. Act now for safety and refunds.
